parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ fields: { clientId: $json.clientId, businessName: $json.businessName, industry: $json.industry, language: $json.language, googleReviewUrl: $json.googleReviewUrl || null, notificationEmail: $json.email, clientPassword: $json.password, aiTopics: $json.aiTopics || null, aiTones: $json.aiTones || null, aiStyles: $json.aiStyles || null, suggestedReviewText: $json.suggestedReviewText || null, active: true, aiMaxSentences: 2 } }) }}

parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ clientId: $('Code - Parse AI Config').item.json.clientId, suggestedReviewText: $('Code - Parse AI Config').item.json.suggestedReviewText, message: 'success' }) }}
